summary: ClashSolverMoveObjectDownOrCentreInSpaceCommand — PDF "MOVE_OBJECT_DOWN". Shift -Z by step if clearance ≥ threshold, else centre on Z.
usecase: Solver -Z nudge when void below is deeper.
notfor: Up moves — use the mirror command.
precondition: Active document; one service/element resolvable; default 3D view.
postcondition: Zero or one ElementTransformUtils.MoveElement inside the service's Transaction.
logictree:
1) Resolver_ElementUniqueId required OR single selection.
2) Delegate to TryDirectionalMoveOnService.ProbeAndMove(doc, el, -Z, step_ft, threshold_ft, centre_fallback).
3) Emit outcome + clash_id audit linkage.
